dialogue_text: Why are you so quiet, Dejah Thoris?
source_excerpt: "Why are you so quiet, Dejah Thoris?" I asked. "Possibly you would rather return to Sola and your quarters."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: Possibly you would rather return to Sola and your quarters.
source_excerpt: "Why are you so quiet, Dejah Thoris?" I asked. "Possibly you would rather return to Sola and your quarters."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

source_excerpt: "No," she murmured, "I am happy here. I do not know why it is that I should always be happy and contented when you, John Carter, a stranger, are with me; yet at such times it seems that I am safe and that, with you, I shall soon return t...

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: I am happy here. I do not know why it is that I should always be happy and contented when you, John Carter, a stranger, are with me; yet at such times it seems that I am safe and that, with you, I shall soon return to my father's court and feel his strong arms about me and my mother's tears and kisses on my cheek.
source_excerpt: "No," she murmured, "I am happy here. I do not know why it is that I should always be happy and contented when you, John Carter, a stranger, are with me; yet at such times it seems that I am safe and that, with you, I shall soon return t...

speaker.notes: Context suggests a female speaker, but the source wording is still ambiguous.

dialogue_text: Do people kiss, then, upon Barsoom?
source_excerpt: "Do people kiss, then, upon Barsoom?" I asked, when she had explained the word she used, in answer to my inquiry as to its meaning.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
